title: Set Activity in Teamboard
excerpt: When creating a resource item in the Teamboard view, I cannot set the Activity. Instead I need to create the item, go back in and edit it in order to set the Activity. I would like to be able to set the Actvity when crea…

posts.author: joegregory (Joe Gregory)
posts.cookedHtml: When creating a resource item in the Teamboard view, I cannot set the Activity. Instead I need to create the item, go back in and edit it in order to set the Activity. I would like to be able to set the Actvity when creating the item.

posts.author: Teresa.DevSamurai (Teresa Tran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Joe,

Thank you for your interest in the TeamBoard app. I’m Teresa from TeamBoard Team.

We’re sorry to hear about the issue you’re encountering. Please send a detailed description of the problem to our support team at monday@devsamurai.com. They will assist you in resolving this issue promptly.

Thank you,
Teresa
